summary: P0 Bug Fix VERIFIED: Vocabulary Mastered and Agentic Reach Score now showing correctly. Root cause was data type mismatch - mastered_tokens was typed as List[MasteredToken] (dicts) but narrative completion stored tokens as plain strings, causing Pydantic ResponseValidationError (500). Fix: Changed model to 'list' type, normalized tokens to plain strings.

minor.note: Console warnings about chart dimensions (recharts library) - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: P0 Fix confirmed: models.py line 201 - mastered_tokens changed from List[MasteredToken] to list (plain strings)
P0 Fix confirmed: server.py lines 1369-1384 - narrative completion normalizes existing tokens to strings before adding new ones
P0 Fix confirmed: server.py lines 680-681 - progress endpoint handles mixed-type tokens (string or dict)
Login response uses 'access_token' field (not 'token') - confirmed working
seed_data_creation: None - used existing SJ student with id 18316e14-9f7f-4960-9aba-e809fad104a2
